childhood.familyBackground: A Canadian rally race car driver and venture capitalist, Peter Thomson is a member of the wealthiest Thomson family in Canada. He built his wealth through a significant stake in The Woodbridge Company, alongside his siblings.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: Peter Thomson은 포브스 2026년 억만장자 순위 567위입니다. 여기에서 Peter Thomson의 경력, 자산 요약 등에 대해 자세히 알아보세요.
childhood.education: Details of Peter Thomson's formal education are documented in limited public sources.
childhood.educationKo: Peter Thomson의 정규 교육에 대한 세부사항은 제한된 공개 자료에 기록되어 있음.
childhood.earlyLife: Peter Thomson built a career in Thomson Reuters, becoming one of the world's wealthiest individuals.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: Peter Thomson은(는) Thomson Reuters 분야에서 경력을 쌓아 세계 최고 부호 중 한 명이 됨.

careerTimeline.event: Joined family business in Thomson Reuters
Net worth reached $6.7B, ranking among world's wealthiest
careerTimeline.eventKo: 순자산 6.70억 달러 도달, 세계 최고 부호 대열

failures.description: COVID-19 pandemic created unprecedented challenges across global business
failures.descriptionKo: 코로나19 팬데믹이 전 세계 비즈니스에 전례 없는 도전 초래
failures.lesson: Adaptability and resilience are essential for surviving global crises
failures.lessonKo: 글로벌 위기를 생존하는 데 적응력과 회복력이 필수적

personalTraits.knownFor: Building wealth through Thomson Reuters. One of the world's wealthiest individuals with net worth of $6.7B.
personalTraits.knownForKo: Thomson Reuters을(를) 통해 부를 축적. 순자산 $6.7B의 세계 최고 부호 중 한 명.
